headline: The Troubled Century: Al Gore wins after full Florida recount

events.title: 2000 US Presidential Election
events.description: Al Gore wins after full Florida recount
events.explanation: Butterfly ballot confusion resolved, Gore carries Florida by ~2,000 votes

events.title: Dot-Com Crash Aftermath
events.description: Full recession; unemployment hits 8%

events.title: September 11 Attacks
events.description: 1-2 flights hit targets; others intercepted or failed
events.explanation: Earlier FAA response or passenger awareness prevents full attack

events.title: China Joins WTO
events.description: WTO accession with strict IP and currency conditions enforced
events.explanation: US Congress demands verification mechanisms

events.title: Post-9/11 Security Architecture
events.description: Security measures enacted with sunset clauses and judicial oversight

events.title: Opioid Crisis
events.description: FDA restricts OxyContin by 2005
events.explanation: Early FDA intervention limits prescription

events.title: Columbia Shuttle Disaster

events.title: Iraq War Decision
events.description: UN inspections continue; no military action taken
events.explanation: Inspectors given more time; WMD claims debunked before invasion

events.title: Post-Genome Era
events.description: Funding dries up when miracle cures don't materialize; genomics enters winter

events.title: BRICS / Emerging Market Boom

events.title: Social Media Emergence

events.title: Drone Warfare Program
events.description: Autonomous lethal drones deployed by 2010

events.title: Record Hurricane Season

events.title: Indian Ocean Tsunami
events.description: Hypothetical early detection system in place; deaths reduced to ~30K

events.title: Hurricane Katrina Response
events.description: FEMA acts within 24 hours; ~400 deaths
events.explanation: Pre-positioned assets and faster evacuation

events.title: Katrina Racial Reckoning
events.description: Katrina triggers immediate racial justice reforms

events.title: Cloud Computing / AWS

events.title: Smartphone Revolution

events.title: US Shale / Fracking Revolution

events.title: Beijing Olympics

events.title: 2008 Financial Crisis

events.explanation: Derivatives regulated post-Enron; housing bubble smaller

events.title: 2008 US Presidential Election
events.description: Barack Obama wins presidency; first Black president

events.title: Twitter Becomes Political Infrastructure
events.description: Twitter becomes the political town square for real-time discourse and outrage

events.title: Haiti Earthquake
events.description: Haiti actually rebuilt with resilient infrastructure

events.title: Collapse of Local Journalism
events.description: Google and Facebook forced to share advertising revenue with news publishers
events.explanation: Australia-style legislation passes in the US and EU, funding local newsrooms

events.title: Deepwater Horizon Oil Spill
events.description: Stricter MMS oversight catches blowout preventer failure before disaster

events.title: Euro Sovereign Debt Crisis

events.explanation: Germany agrees to mutual debt; faster recovery

events.title: SpaceX and Reusable Rocketry

events.explanation: Regulatory barriers and risk aversion prevent commercial space from flourishing

events.title: Stuxnet / Cyber Warfare

events.title: Fukushima Nuclear Disaster

events.title: Libya Intervention
events.description: NATO intervenes; Gaddafi killed; Libya descends into chaos

events.title: Occupy Wall Street

events.title: Instagram / Visual Social Media

events.explanation: COPPA-style legislation with real enforcement protects minors from social media harms

events.title: YouTube Recommendation Radicalization
events.description: YouTube identifies and fixes the radicalization pipeline by 2015
events.explanation: Internal research leads to algorithm changes prioritizing quality over engagement

events.title: Deep Learning / AlexNet Breakthrough

events.description: Broadcast TV remains dominant longer; shared cultural reference points maintained
events.explanation: Streaming grows slowly; network TV retains majority viewership through 2020

events.description: Podcasts genuinely diversify the media landscape with underrepresented voices
events.explanation: Low barrier to entry enables diverse perspectives; reduces media consolidation effects

events.title: Antibiotic Resistance Escalation

events.title: Marriage Equality / Gender Politics

events.title: WhatsApp as Political Misinformation Vector

events.explanation: India and Brazil mandate message origin tracking; reduces viral misinformation

events.explanation: Early ad revenue sharing rules and verification requirements eliminate profit motive

events.title: Brexit Referendum
events.description: Remain wins 52-48%
events.explanation: Turnout patterns slightly different; undecided break for status quo

events.title: Misinformation Epidemic
events.description: Misinformation worsens through COVID, elections, and social media

events.description: Hillary Clinton wins; first female president
events.explanation: Comey letter doesn't happen or less impactful

events.title: WannaCry / Cyber Escalation

events.title: Battery Storage Revolution

events.explanation: FEMA pre-positions resources; military deploys immediately

events.title: Content Moderation at Scale
events.description: AI-based content moderation achieves 95%+ accuracy across languages
events.explanation: Advances in NLP and computer vision enable effective automated moderation

events.explanation: Feedback loops between fire, drought, and deforestation create recurring crises

events.title: COVID-19 Emergence

events.title: Digital Identity Infrastructure
events.description: International digital ID standard enables seamless global identity

events.title: Remote Work Revolution
events.description: Hybrid work becomes norm for knowledge workers

events.title: COVID-19 Global Response
events.description: Fragmented global response; record vaccine development but unequal access

events.title: George Floyd / 2020 Racial Reckoning
events.description: Massive global protests; corporate DEI pledges; policing reform debates; backlash follows

events.title: COVID Mental Health Crisis
events.description: Global mental health crisis; youth especially affected

events.title: TikTok / Algorithmic Media
events.description: Youth reject social media; digital minimalism trend

events.title: Education Disruption
events.description: Education permanently transformed; AI tutoring emerges

events.description: Extremely close result; weeks of legal challenges

events.description: Triggers massive cybersecurity reform

events.title: January 6 Capitol Breach
events.description: Mob breaches Capitol; certification delayed but completed
